---
title: "Activity 2"
format: pdf
editor: visual
authors: Michael McCarey, Matt Hunter
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| warning: FALSE

#Add libraries as needed
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

#Read in Dataset
insurance <- read.csv("insurance_data_S26.csv")
```

priorclaims, sex, age, smoker, BMI

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r}
#| label: bmi plot
#| echo: False

plot(insurance$charges, insurance$bmi,
     col  = adjustcolor("steelblue", alpha.f = 0.5),
     pch  = 19,
     xlab = "Charges",
     ylab = "BMI",
     main = "BMI vs Charges")






```
```{r}
#| label: validation set approach

set.seed(735)
insurance_index <- sample(
  x = 1:nrow(insurance), 
  size = floor(0.85*nrow(insurance)))
insuranceTrain <- insurance[insurance_index, ]
insuranceValidation <- insurance[-insurance_index, ]
```

```{r}    
#| label: Forward BIC
#| 
Full_Model <- lm(
  charges ~ .,
  data = insurance)

Null_Model <- lm(
  charges ~ 1,
  data = insurance)
forward_BIC <- stats::step(object = Null_Model,
            scope = list(lower = Null_Model, upper = Full_Model),
            data = insurance,
            direction = "forward",
            k = log(nrow(insurance)),
            trace = 0)
#smoker, age, bmi, children
#intercept: -11627.9
#smoker: 23016.6, age: 257.6, bmi: 310.6, children: 503.0
# formula: charges = -11627.9 + 23016.6(smokeryes) + 257.6(age) + 310.6(bmi) + 503.0(children)
RMSE_Forward_BIC <- modelr::rmse(
    model = forward_BIC,
    data = insuranceValidation
  )


#RMSE 6537.112
```
```{r}    
#| label: RMSE table
RMSE_insurance_table <- data.frame(
  Model = c("Forward BIC", "Backward AIC")
  RMSE = c(RMSE_Forward_BIC, )
)
  

```

![](images/clipboard-3093701800.png)

```         
```
